#pragma once

#include <cuda_runtime.h>
#include <cuda_fp16.h>

/**
 * Launches the GEMM kernel optimized for A800 (Ampere) architecture.
 * 
 * @param A Pointer to matrix A [M, K]
 * @param B Pointer to matrix B [N, K]
 * @param C Pointer to output matrix C [M, N]
 * @param M Dimension M (variable)
 * @param N Dimension N (constant 5120)
 * @param K Dimension K (constant 2048)
 */
void launch_gemm_n5120_k2048(
    half* A, 
    half* B, 
    half* C, 
    int M, 
    int N, 
    int K
);
